        """
        Convenience wrapper over setup_data that exposes fields as attributes
        and ensures the debtor is activated before GPD tests.
    
        e.g. gpd_test_data.debtor_fc, gpd_test_data.iupd, …

        debtor_fc = setup_data["debtor_fc"]
